mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_login_log (login_log_id, user_id, username, login_time, login_ip, login_location, login_device, login_status, fail_reason, create_time) VALUES (#{loginLogId}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{loginTime}, #{loginIp}, #{loginLocation}, #{loginDevice}, #{loginStatus}, #{failReason}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_login_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
